Help.Topic: Conserve supplies by printing multiple pages per side of the paper.
Conserve supplies by printing on both sides of the paper.
“Two-sided printing” is not available because "Booklet" is selected in the "Advanced layout" menu.
“Sheets per bundle” is not available because “Fold” is selected in the “Fold” menu.
“Booklet” is not available because an option other than “Use printer setting,” “Off,” or “Saddle stitching” is selected in the “Staple” menu.
“Booklet” is not available because an option other than “Use printer setting” or “Off” is selected in the “Hole punch” menu.
“Poster” is not available because an option other than “Use printer setting,” “Off,” or “Saddle stitching” is selected in the “Staple” menu.
“Poster” is not available because an option other than “Use printer setting” or “Off” is selected in the "Hole punch" menu.
“Poster” is not available because an option other than “Off” is selected in the “Fold” menu.
“Booklet” is not available because “Fold individual pages” is selected in the “Fold” menu.
“Booklet” is not available because a “Trifold” option is selected in the “Fold” menu.
“Poster” is not available because a “Trifold” option is selected in the “Fold” menu.
“Booklet” is not available because “Add blank/preprinted front cover” is selected in the “Paper” section.
“Pages per side” is not available because “Add blank/preprinted front cover” is selected in the “Paper” section.
“Poster” is not available because “Add blank/preprinted front cover” is selected in the “Paper” section.
“Booklet” is not available because “Add blank/preprinted back cover” is selected in the “Paper” section.
“Pages per side” is not available because “Add blank/preprinted back cover” is selected in the “Paper” section.
“Poster” is not available because “Add blank/preprinted back cover” is selected in the “Paper” section.
“Booklet” is not available because “Use different paper for first printed page” is selected in the “Paper” section.
“Pages per side” is not available because “Use different paper for first printed page” is selected in the “Paper” section.
“Poster” is not available because “Use different paper for first printed page” is selected in the “Paper” section.
“Booklet” is not available because “Use different paper for last printed page” is selected in the “Paper” section.
“Pages per side” is not available because “Use different paper for last printed page” is selected in the “Paper” section.
“Poster” is not available because “Use different paper for last printed page” is selected in the “Paper” section.
The selected option is not recommended for use with envelope paper sizes. This setting may produce unexpected results or may cancel the print job.
The selected option is not recommended for use with envelope paper sizes. This setting may produce unexpected results or may cancel the print job.
The selected option is not recommended for use with the selected paper type. This setting may produce unexpected results or may cancel the print job.
The selected option is not recommended for use with the selected paper type. This setting may produce unexpected results or may cancel the print job.
"Maintain original page size” can be used only with the statement, letter, B5, A5, A4, and A6 paper sizes. Any other paper size selection may produce unexpected results or may cancel the print job.
The selected option is not recommended for use as a booklet cover. This setting may produce unexpected results or may cancel the print job.
The selected option is not recommended for use with the selected “Document reading order” option. This setting may produce unexpected results or may cancel the print job.
The selected option is not recommended for use with the selected “Document reading order” option. This setting may produce unexpected results or may cancel the print job.
The selected option is not recommended for use with the selected “Document reading order” option. This setting may produce unexpected results or may cancel the print job.
The selected option is not recommended for use with the selected “Document reading order” option. This setting may produce unexpected results or may cancel the print job.
The selected option is not recommended for use with the selected “Binding edge” option. This setting may produce unexpected results or may cancel the print job.
The selected option is not recommended for use with the selected “Binding edge” option. This setting may produce unexpected results or may cancel the print job.
The selected option is not recommended for use with the selected “Presentation direction” option. This setting may produce unexpected results or may cancel the print job.
The selected option is not recommended for use with the selected “Presentation direction” option. This setting may produce unexpected results or may cancel the print job.
“Booklet” is not available because “Add blank/preprinted covers” is selected in the “Paper” section.
“Poster” is not available because “Add blank/preprinted covers” is selected in the “Paper” section.
“Booklet” is not available because “Use different paper for first/last printed page” is selected in the “Paper” section.
“Poster” is not available because “Use different paper for first/last printed page” is selected in the “Paper” section.
The “Automatic” option is not available because “Selected paper size” is selected in the “Output paper size” menu.
The “Selected paper size” option is not available because “Automatic” is selected in the “Scaling” menu.
This feature is not available because “Booklet” is selected in the “Advanced layout” menu.
This feature is not available because “Poster” is selected in the “Advanced layout” menu.
This feature is not available because an option other than one is selected in the “Pages per side” menu.
The selected option is not recommended for use with the "Booklet" option in the "Advanced layout" menu. This setting may produce unexpected results or may cancel the print job.
The selected option is not recommended for use with the "Poster" option in the ”Advanced layout" menu. This setting may produce unexpected results or may cancel the print job.
The selected option is not recommended for use with the selected "Hole punch" option. This setting may produce unexpected results or may cancel the print job.

The selected option is not recommended for use with the selected "Two‑sided printing" option. This setting may produce unexpected results or may cancel the print job.

Some settings may be unavailable because "Booklet" is selected in the "Advanced layout" menu.
“Hole punch” is not available because "Booklet" is selected in the "Advanced layout" menu.
“Staple” is not available because "Poster" is selected in the "Advanced layout" menu.
“Hole punch” is not available because "Poster" is selected in the "Advanced layout" menu.
“Staple” is not available because “Fold individual pages” is selected in the “Fold” menu.
Some settings may be unavailable because “Fold” is selected in the “Fold” menu.
“Fold” is not available because an option other than ”Use printer setting,” “Off,” or “Saddle stitching” is selected in the “Staple” menu.
“Fold individual pages” is not available because “Saddle stitching” is selected in the “Staple” menu.
“Hole punch” is not available because an option other than “Off” is selected in the “Fold” menu.
“Fold” is not available because an option other than ”Use printer setting” or “Off” is selected in the “Hole punch” menu.
“Fold” is not available because “Poster” is selected in the “Advanced layout” menu.
“Fold individual pages” is not available because “Booklet” is selected in the “Advanced layout” menu.
“Staple” is not available because a “Trifold” option is selected in the “Fold” menu.
“Hole punch” is not available because a “Trifold” option is selected in the “Fold” menu.
“Trifold” options are not available because “Saddle stitching” is selected in the “Staple” menu.
The selected option is not recommended for use with the "Transparency" option in the "Paper type" menu. This setting may produce unexpected results or may cancel the print job.
The selected option is not recommended for use with the "Transparency" option in the "Paper type" menu. This setting may produce unexpected results or may cancel the print job.
The selected option is not recommended for use with the "Transparency" option in the "Paper type" menu. This setting may produce unexpected results or may cancel the print job.
Conserve supplies by decreasing the “Toner darkness” setting.
If you select a different watermark and apply the changes, then you may lose this watermark. Use the watermark manager to save this watermark.
